task_completion.description: Verify the bibliography file is created and saved in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file manager showing the file named 'privacy_research_bibliography.txt' located in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the use of the required heading format for each entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains headings formatted exactly as '## Source [Number]' (e.g., '## Source 1', '## Source 2') separating the entries.

task_completion.description: Verify the Electronic Frontier Foundation entry contains all required components.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An entry under a Source heading containing the URL (eff.org/issues/anonymity), the page title, the organization name ('Electronic Frontier Foundation' or 'EFF'), and a 1-2 sentence description of the page's focus.

task_completion.description: Verify the Tor Project entry contains all required components.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An entry under a Source heading containing the URL (torproject.org/about/history), the page title, the organization name ('Tor Project'), and a 1-2 sentence description of the page's focus.

task_completion.description: Verify the Freedom of the Press Foundation entry contains all required components.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An entry under a Source heading containing the URL (freedom.press), the page title, the organization name ('Freedom of the Press Foundation' or 'Freedom of the Press'), and a 1-2 sentence description of the page's focus.

task_completion.description: Verify the Privacy Guides entry contains all required components.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An entry under a Source heading containing the URL (privacyguides.org), the page title, the organization name ('Privacy Guides'), and a 1-2 sentence description of the page's focus.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually visited the websites to gather information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a web browser open and navigating to the required URLs (eff.org, torproject.org, freedom.press, privacyguides.org).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a text editor to compile the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a GUI text editor (e.g., gedit, mousepad, VS Code) being used to write and save the bibliography, rather than just terminal echo/cat commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a script to bypass manual compilation or web browsing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of python or bash scripts in the terminal that hardcode the final text output without actually reading the web pages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target File: /home/ga/Documents/privacy_research_bibliography.txt. Required URLs to check for: eff.org/issues/anonymity, torproject.org/about/history, freedom.press, privacyguides.org. Required Organizations to check for: 'Electronic Frontier Foundation' (or 'EFF'), 'Tor Project', 'Freedom of the Press' (or 'freedom.press'), 'Privacy Guides' (or 'privacyguides'). Each entry must have a URL, Title, Organization Name, and a 1-2 sentence description.
